items.title: Morgan Stanley's Oldenburg: Bitcoin on U.S. bank balance sheets is coming, just not yet
items.desc: Morgan Stanley launched the first bank-issued Bitcoin ETP, but Amy Oldenburg said advisors, regulators and balance sheets still have a long way to go.

items.title: Strategy takes Bitcoin buying breather ahead of Q1 earnings report
items.desc: Michael Saylor signaled a “pause” on BTC buying ahead of Tuesday’s earnings report, with Wall Street expecting a loss for Q1.

items.title: New York AG settles for $5 million with Uphold in first enforcement action against a crypto yield product promoter
items.desc: The settlement is the first New York enforcement action to target a platform that promoted someone else's crypto yield product rather than its own issuer.

items.title: How Canton Network Lets Institutions Guard Against DeFi Security Risks: Digital Asset CEO
items.desc: Because Canton allows participants to implement guardrails, Digital Asset's Yuval Rooz said institutions can protect against bad actors.

items.title: North Korea terrorism creditors move to seize Arbitrum-frozen Kelp DAO ETH ahead of DeFi United vote
items.desc: The plaintiffs are not Kelp DAO hack victims but families holding three unsatisfied terrorism judgments against North Korea looking to collect on debts.

items.title: Policy Summit and other things at Consensus 2026: State of Crypto
items.desc: We are kicking off the show in Miami this week. Here's what you should attend.

items.title: New Bitcoin quantum proposal offers Satoshi Nakamoto a way to prove control without moving BTC
items.desc: A new design proposed by venture fund Paradigm would let holders privately timestamp proof that they control vulnerable keys before quantum computers arrive, creating a possible rescue path if Bitcoin ever sunsets old addresses.

items.title: Bitcoin preps highest weekly close since January as BTC price nears $79K
items.desc: Bitcoin canceled out the week's earlier losses to tease the highest BTC price weekly candle close since the end of January near $79,000.

items.title: Crypto is at bottom of U.S. voters' priorities heading into elections, CoinDesk survey shows
items.desc: Americans had a generally unfavorable view of cryptocurrencies, the survey of 1,000 randomly selected registered voters found.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.desc: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Mike Cagney’s second act: Turning blockchain into Wall Street’s new plumbing
items.desc: Figure’s $1 billion month capped a years-long push to strip out middlemen from credit markets, bringing real-world assets, lending and even equities onchain.

items.title: Iran’s largest crypto exchange founded by sons of family tied to supreme leaders: Reuters
items.desc: Nobitex, Iran’s largest crypto exchange, was founded by brothers linked to the powerful Kharrazi family, which has ties to the country’s supreme leaders.

items.title: US CISA adds ‘insane’ Linux Copy Fail flaw to watch list
items.desc: Malicious actors with code execution capability may gain root access on Linux systems using as few as 10 lines of Python, according to a researcher.

items.title: New York forces Uphold to pay $5M over fraudulent crypto investment scheme
items.desc: New York AG Letitia James secured a $5 million settlement from Uphold for promoting CredEarn, a crypto savings product that misled users about its risks.

items.title: Crypto industry will be ‘just fine’ if CLARITY Act doesn’t pass: Chris Perkins
items.desc: The efforts of the SEC and CFTC chairmen indicate that the crypto industry will not suffer without the CLARITY Act, according to crypto executive Chris Perkins.

items.title: Bitcoin logs best monthly performance in 12 months during April
items.desc: Despite being the best-performing month in the past 12 months, Bitcoin still came in slightly below its historical average, according to CoinGlass data.

items.title: BlackRock urges OCC to drop tokenized reserve cap idea, expand eligible assets in GENIUS Act comment letter
items.desc: The world's largest asset manager opposed a potential 20% cap on tokenized reserve assets, a constraint that would limit products like its BUIDL fund.

items.title: Wallets seized by OFAC may not be Iranian; other state actors instead: Analyst
items.desc: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said that wallets the US targeted as part of Operation Economic Fury were linked to Tehran, but analysis of the wallets' characteristics suggests otherwise.

items.title: Leading Iranian crypto exchange Nobitex was founded by sons of elite political family tied to supreme leaders: Reuters
items.desc: Reuters found that hundreds of millions of dollars in transactions tied to sanctioned Iranian state entities have moved through Nobitex since 2018.

items.title: Brazil's central bank bans stablecoin and crypto settlement in cross-border payments
items.desc: The ban applies to fintechs and payment firms, closing the back-end payment rail for cross-border flows, but individual crypto investors can still buy and hold assets.

items.title: Crypto industry backs CLARITY Act yield compromise, pushes Senate Banking for markup
items.desc: The agreement necessitates firms restructure reward programs from a "buy and hold" to a "buy and use" model; however, CCI raised concerns over its broad prohibition.

items.title: Bitcoin's 'hazardous' airdrop: Why developers are warning against Paul Sztorc’s eCash fork
items.desc: Developers and industry figures say the eCash proposal introduces user risk, uneven distribution and philosophical tension.

items.title: Coinbase says deal reached on Clarity Act stablecoin yield, clearing path to long-stalled Senate markup
items.desc: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong urged the Senate Banking Committee to "mark it up" as a months-long stalemate appears to be at an end.

items.title: The $292M crypto hack exposed DeFi's weak spots. Here’s what must change, insiders say
items.desc: As Wall Street moves onchain, the year's biggest crypto hack and DeFi crisis is forcing a rethink of risk, security and market structure, industry insiders told CoinDesk.

items.title: Prediction markets are ditching the 'casino' label to become a regular part of how people track the news
items.desc: A new report from Bitget and Polymarket reveals that prediction markets are evolving into a $240 billion industry driven by retail users who are trading more frequently on everything from crypto to politics.

items.title: Riot posts $167M in Q1 revenue as data center arm pulls in $33M in first quarter
items.desc: Riot Platforms reported $167.2 million in Q1 2026 revenue, with its new data center business contributing $33.2 million as Bitcoin mining income fell.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells another 10,000 ETH to BitMine in third OTC deal
items.desc: The Ethereum Foundation has now sold roughly $47 million worth of ETH to BitMine in a week, drawing fresh criticism over the pace and scale of its sales.

items.title: Kraken parent Payward closes Bitnomial deal to expand US crypto derivatives
items.desc: The acquisition provides a fully licensed derivatives stack under CFTC oversight, covering trading, clearing and brokerage.

items.title: Bitcoin above $78,000 as Senate clears Clarity Act yield hurdle, S&P 500 sets new record
items.desc: Bitcoin recovered from a midweek dip to $75,500 to climb back above $78,000 by Saturday morning in Asia, with the Senate's stablecoin yield compromise removing a key roadblock to crypto market structure legislation.

items.title: Bitcoin doesn’t need a fresh narrative to reclaim $100K: Analyst
items.desc: With attention spilling into multiple other technology sectors, crypto may struggle to capture a strong, price-driving narrative, a crypto analyst says.

items.title: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield rules finalized: ‘Go time’ for crypto bill
items.desc: Galaxy Digital head of research Alex Thorn expects the banking industry to “increase their opposition efforts” following the release of the final stablecoin yield provisions.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.
